description: Get a single project given a company ID and project ID

parameters.name: company_id
parameters.description:
Unique identifier for the company. This parameter accepts both formats:
- **Recommended**: Procore company ID (integer) - Use this for new integrations
- Legacy: LaborChart UUID format (uuid string...

schema.description: Response schema for a single Project.

project_number.description: Unique identifier for the Project used internally.

status.description: The status of the Project, controlling visibility and filtering.

start_date.description: Project's start date in Epoch time.

est_end_date.description: Estimated end date for the Project in Epoch time.

closed_date.description: If the Project is closed, this is the closed date in Epoch time.

timezone.description: Timezone used for scheduling outbound messages.

daily_start_time.description: Default start time for the Project's workday.

daily_end_time.description: Default end time for the Project's workday.

customer_name.description: The name of the customer for the Project.

project_type.description: Internal categorical classification for the Project.

address_1.description: The first part of the Project's address.

address_2.description: The second part of the Project's address.

city_town.description: The city or town where the Project is located.

state_province.description: The state or province where the Project is located.

zipcode.description: The postal/zip code of the Project.

country.description: The country where the Project is located.

stage_id.description: The ID of the project stage.

group_ids.description: List of UUIDs representing the Groups associated with the Project.

roles.description: List of people assigned to roles in the Project.

person_id.description: UUID of the Person assigned to the role.

job_title_id.description: UUID of the Job Title associated with the role. If omitted, the Person's default Job Title is used.

categories.description: List of Categories and their Subcategories within the Project.

tag_instances.description: List of Tags associated with the Project.

wage_overrides.description: List of Wage Overrides set for specific Job Titles on this Project.

rate.description: Hourly wage override for the Job Title.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the Project was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the Project was last updated.
